headings.usage: All section titles, hero text. Use tracking-tight (-0.02em) for large text.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI labels. Use relaxed line-height.

mono.usage: Code snippets, data metrics, decorative numbers.

borders.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border using mask-image or moving background position

Hero.description: Full screen height. Background is a R3F scene with instanced particles (8000+) connected by lines, simulating a neural network or encrypted data stream. Foreground content: Large 'Space Grotesk' headline with text-glow, and two CTA buttons (one solid neon, one glass).
Hero.specs: Particles must respond to mouse movement or have orbital flow.

Navbar.style: Fixed top, detached from edges (floating pill shape), heavy glassmorphism. Logo on left, Links center, 'Get Audit' button right.

ServiceCards.style: Dark glass background. On hover: Border lights up (cyan/purple), card lifts (-y-2), internal icon glows. Use 'Tilt' effect if possible.
ServiceCards.content: Icon + Title + Short Description + 'Learn More' arrow.

TechStack.style: Two rows moving in opposite directions. Badges are pill-shaped, dark grey bg with neon borders.

Portfolio.style: Large project screenshots. Use 'ScrollTrigger' to reveal them with a staggering effect. Images should have a subtle 'glitch' effect on hover.

ContactForm.style: Input fields look like terminal command lines. Monospace font for inputs. Submit button says 'EXECUTE_TRANSMISSION'.

about_section.desc: Futuristic team meeting in dark room

office_vibe.desc: Man working late at desk, cyberpunk vibe

assets_and_icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px. Color: Cyan or White.
assets_and_icons.custom_svgs: Use simple geometric shapes (hexagons, circuits) as background decorations.

motion_guidelines.transitions: All sections must fade-in and slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) on scroll.
motion_guidelines.micro_interactions: Buttons: Scale 0.95 on click. Links: Underline expands from center. Cards: Glow intensity increases on hover.
motion_guidelines.3d_performance: Use 'instancedMesh' for particles. Limit post-processing bloom on mobile.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure neon text is not placed on light backgrounds. Use white text for main content.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable R3F particles and smooth scroll if 'prefers-reduced-motion' is true.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Setup 'Space Grotesk' and 'JetBrains Mono' fonts via Google Fonts import in index.css.
3. Create a 'components/3d/ParticleNetwork.jsx' using the R3F instancedMesh technique.
4. Build the 'Hero' section with the 3D component as a background layer (z-0) and content overlay (z-10).
5. Use Shadcn UI components for the Contact Form but heavily customize styles to match the 'Terminal' look (remove white backgrounds, use transparent borders).
6. Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
